eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Garfield, OK; at 08:51 PM ON APR 23, 2026 Effective until 10:51 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Those affected by the tornado in Garfield County can go to the Chisholm Trail Expo Center at 111 West Perdue Ave  Enid  OK  to reunite with loved ones and receive resources for those displaced. A reunification center has been established at the Chisholm Trail Expo Center  111 West Perdue Ave  Enid  OK. Please bring identification if possible.
